title: codereview-P2: ccp15 test in test_vectors.py should validate new density_estimate_high fields
description: python/tests/test_vectors.py:719 The _ccp15_cases and test_ccp15_vector only checks expected_sf, load_factor, snr_ema. New vectors use density, per_percent, expected_density so add assertions for them to prevent regression. Correctness pass. Tagged codereview.
